ts-peanut-butter-balls.name: T's Peanut Butter Balls
instructions: Beat peanut butter in a bowl of a stand mixer on low speed until creamy. Add coconut oil, agave nectar, sea salt, flax seed, hempseed, rolled oats, dark chocolate chips, and pecan pieces respectively, beating dough well after each addition.
Scoop dough into smalls balls onto a plate. Chill in the refrigerator until set, at least 30 minutes.

tagliolini-with-crab-meat-argiro.name: Tagliolini With Crab Meat
instructions: Heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the crab and garlic and sauce for 2–3–1.
Add the tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add salt, pepper and parsley.
Boil the pasta in salted water.
As they are dripping, add them to the sauce and bottle them for 1’-2’ on high heat.
If it is dry, add some water from the pasta and mix.
Add the myzithra, mix and serve immediately.

tamale-pie.name: Tamale Pie

ingredients.prep: ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat ¼ cup vegetable oil in a medium heavy skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Cook 1 green bell pepper, ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped, and 2 medium onions, finely chopped, stirring occasionally, until onions are softened and translucent, 8–10 minutes.

Add 3 Tbsp. chili powder, 3 Tbsp. double-concentrated tomato paste, 2 Tbsp. chicken bouillon paste, 2 tsp. garlic powder, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. dried oregano, 1 tsp. ground cumin, and ½ cup water. Cook, stirring often, until tomato paste is brick red and beginning to stick to bottom of pan, 5–8 minutes. Add 8 oz. ground beef and 1 cup water and cook, stirring often to break up meat into small pieces, until beef is mostly gray but with some pink still remaining, about 4 minutes.

Add one 15-oz. can pinto beans, rinsed, to beef mixture. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until flavors are melded and chili is slightly thickened, 8–10 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Let cool while you make the cornbread batter.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat oven to 375°. Whisk together ½ cup (63 g) all-purpose flour, ½ cup (80 g) medium-grind yellow cornmeal, ⅓ cup (66 g) sugar, 1½ tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl. Whisk 1 large egg, ½ cup sour cream, and 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, melted, in a small bowl to combine. Make a well in the center of dry ingredients and pour in egg mixture; stir with a whisk or rubber spatula until combined (batter will be very stiff). Add 4 oz. extra-sharp cheddar cheese, coarsely grated; fold in until incorporated. Using a tablespoon (easier option) or a #60 or #70 cookie scoop (prettier option), dollop batter over meat mixture in skillet (it’s okay if chili is still a bit warm), spacing about ½" apart.

Bake tamale pie until cornbread springs back when gently pressed and a toothpick or cake tester inserted into the center of cornbread comes out mostly clean with a few moist crumbs attached, 25–30 minutes. Let cool 5–10 minutes before serving.

taqueria-guacamole.name: Taqueria Guacamole
instructions: Mash avocado, lime juice, and a pinch of salt in a mortar and pestle or a medium bowl with a fork until thick and smooth. Mix in 1/4 cup water 1 tablespoonful at a time until mixture is creamy and smooth. Stir in cilantro. Season with salt.

thanksgiving-leftover-stuffing-muffins.name: Thanksgiving Leftover Stuffing Muffins

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Spray muffin tin cups with cooking spray.

Combine stuffing, turkey, and corn kernels in a large bowl, and stir gently. If mixture is particularly dry, add 1 tablespoon chicken broth, a little at a time, until mixture is moist, but not mushy. Loosely and equally portion stuffing mixture amongst the 12 muffin cups. Insert a Cheddar cheese cube into the center of each muffin cup.

Whisk eggs, 2 tablespoons chicken broth, salt, and pepper together in a cup. Divide egg mixture evenly among the cups. The egg mixture will not completely cover the stuffing, but it puffs up when baked.
Bake in the preheated oven until muffins are browned and slightly crisp on the top, 25 to 30 minutes.
Allow to cool for about 5 minutes before removing the muffins by running a knife around the edge of each cup. Serve warm with a dollop of cranberry sauce spooned on the top.

thanksgiving-turkey-stock.name: Thanksgiving Turkey Stock

ingredients.item: Turkey wings (about 3 pounds each) or 5 pounds chicken wings

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Spread out chicken and turkey wings on a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil; rub oil all over wings. Roast, turning every 10 minutes or so, until brown, 30–40 minutes. Remove from oven; set aside.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in stockpot over medium. Add onion, carrots, celery, garlic, and mushrooms and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, 10–15 minutes. Add ham hock, parsley, bay leaves, wine, peppercorns, and a pinch of salt. Bring to a boil and cook until wine is evaporated, about 5 minutes. Add wings and use a wooden spoon to scrape any crispy bits off baking sheet. (Add a little water to help loosen if needed.) Add another pinch of salt and 2 gallons water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, until meat is falling apart and liquid is reduced by half, 3½–4½ hours (go the full distance for a rich and gelatinous stock).

Scoop out large pieces of vegetables with a slotted spoon; discard. Strain stock into a large pot; discard solids. Let cool slightly, then chill until cold (the fat will solidify on top, making it easy to remove). Skim fat and ladle into airtight containers. Cover and chill until ready to use.
Do Ahead: Stock can be made 1 week ahead. Keep chilled, or freeze up to 6 months.

the-egyptian-rice-with-vermicelli.name: The Egyptian Rice With Vermicelli
instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add vermicelli; cook, stirring constantly, until golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Pour in rice and salt; stir until coated with oil.
Reduce heat to low. Cook the rice mixture, stirring constantly, until rice turns pasty white, 3 to 5 minutes.
Bring water to a boil in a saucepan.
Stir water into the rice mixture. Cover; cook until most of the water is absorbed, 10 to 15 minutes. Turn off heat; let sit until remaining water is absorbed, about 5 minutes. Fluff rice with a fork.

the-foodists-house-cocktail.name: The Foodist’s House Cocktail
instructions: Stir Campari, simple syrup, Angostura bitters, and 1¼ cups water in a measuring cup. Pour into an ice cube tray (preferably silicone with 1-oz. square wells) and freeze; you should have 15.
Finely grate ginger into a cheesecloth-lined bowl. Wrap up ginger and squeeze juice into bowl. You should have about ½ oz. juice.
Place 3 regular ice cubes in each of 2 highball glasses along with 1 Campari ice cube.

Combine tequila, lime juice, simple syrup, and ½ oz. ginger juice in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice and shake until outside of shaker is frosty, about 30 seconds. Strain into glasses. Very slowly pour Campari into each glass, letting it sink. Gently top off with seltzer.

the-golden-age.name: The Golden Age
instructions: Pour all ingredients except grapefruit twist into a large glass filled with ice cubes. Stir with a bar spoon until outside of glass is very cold. Strain into a snifter or coupe glass. Squeeze grapefruit twist over; add as garnish.

the-pastiche-of-the-lazy-argiro.name: The Pastiche Of The Lazy
instructions: Add olive oil to a pan first and sauté the minced meat.
Then add the carrot, onion and garlic.
Mix and leave for 6 minutes.
We put out cognac.
Add the tomatoes, salt and pepper.
Finally, pour some parsley.
In a baking pan, add the eggs, beat and add the feta grated, graviera, yogurt, milk, water, nutmeg, salt, pepper and some butter. Mix well.
Add the cut pasta (always uncooked! Therefore, add the milk and water to the baking pan so that the pasta boils properly during cooking).
Add the minced meat and mix.
Cover the baking pan with aluminum foil or buttered anti-stick paper and bake in a well-heated oven at 200 oC in the resistors, (in the bottom grill) or 170 oC in the air (in the medium grill).
Bake for 40′′.
Remove the fol and continue baking for about 15′ to brown.
If you want, sprinkle the surface with a little cephalotyri in the final baking minutes.
Let the pastitsio stand for 10′-15′ on the bench and enjoy the warm and delicious.

thermomix-lemon-cake-recipe-without-oven.name: Thermomix Lemon Cake ( Recipe Without Oven)
thermomix-lemon-cake-recipe-without-oven.original_name: Tarta de limón Thermomix (receta fácil sin horno)

ingredients.item: 200 ml de nata para montar (crema del leche)
500 g de queso para untar (tipo philadelphia)

instructions: En el vaso limpio y seco trituramos los bizcochos, 5 segundos en velocidad 7. Reservamos en un cuenco. Vertemos la mantequilla fundida en el cuenco de los bizcochos y mezclamos hasta que se impregnen bien. Forramos la base del molde desmontable con papel para hornear. Vertemos la mezcla de bizcochos y mantequilla, distribuimos bien en el molde y llevamos a la nevera.

We put the butterfly on the blades and put the cream cold and cold in the clear glass. We program at 3 and ½ without time, as we see that the cream was assembled we remove and reserve it in the refrigerator.

In the clear glass, we warm up water by planning 4 minutes, varomas, velocity 1. We add the Jelatine and we mix 1 minute with no temperature and velocity 2. We checked that it was well dissolved and we flew into a bin.

We'll put our cheese and sugar back into our clear glass. We program 10 seconds at Speed 3. We add lemon juice and jelly and program 10 seconds, speed 3. We mix the cream we have just prepared with the cream, making smooth and wrapped movements with a spatula.
Vertemos la crema sobre la base y dejamos cuajar toda la noche. Para desmoldar pasamos un cuchillo por el borde.

three-cheese-broccoli-manicotti.name: Three-cheese Broccoli Manicotti
instructions: Bring a pot of generously salted water to a boil.
Meanwhile, separate broccoli stems and florets. Cut florets in half and cut each stem into several pieces lengthwise.
Place stems in the boiling water and cook for 3 to 4 minutes. Then add florets and cook until just barely tender, about 3 more minutes.

Use a slotted spoon to transfer broccoli to a bowl of cold water, leaving the water boiling on the stove. Let broccoli sit until cool, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a colander and let sit until very well drained. Leave the bowl of cold water for the pasta.

Meanwhile, add manicotti to the boiling water and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender but slightly undercooked, 6 to 7 minutes. Use a slotted spoon to gently transfer manicotti into the bowl of cold water.
Chop cooled, drained broccoli into small pieces. Transfer 3 cups chopped broccoli to a mixing bowl and reserve any extra for another use.
Add garlic, ricotta, provolone, 1 ¼ cups Parmigiano-Reggiano, eggs, salt, cayenne, pepper, and nutmeg to the broccoli. Mix with a spoon until thoroughly combined. Cover and refrigerate until needed.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bring tomato sauce and water to a simmer over medium-high heat.
Ladle ½ inch hot sauce into a 9x13-inch baking dish or lasagna pan. Sprinkle in cooked Italian sausage.

Transfer broccoli filling into a pastry bag. Cut off the tip slightly smaller than the opening of the manicotti. Gently pipe stuffing into 12 manicotti, being careful not to overstuff. Place stuffed manicotti in the sauce in the baking dish, angling as necessary to fit.
Ladle in just enough sauce to barely cover the manicotti. Sprinkle ¼ cup Parmigiano-Reggiano over top.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until hot and bubbly, 25 to 30 minutes.
Garnish with parsley and let sit for 10 minutes.
Serve two manicotti per bowl, garnished with more Parmigiano-Reggiano.

tilapia-en-papillote-tilapia-in-parchmen.name: Tilapia En Papillote (tilapia In Parchment)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Butter a baking sheet so that the bottoms of the packets will brown when baked.

Prepare 4 sheets of parchment paper by folding each sheet in half and placing a tilapia fillet centered onto one side of the fold of each sheet. Season the tilapia with salt and black pepper. Top the fillets with equal amounts of tomato, garlic, basil, and capers. Sprinkle lemon juice over the fillets. Place 1 tablespoon butter atop the fish. Drizzle white wine over the fillets.
Roll up the sides of the paper first, then the top, leaving 1/2-inch space along one edge; fold to seal. Grease the bottoms of the packets with 1 tablespoon butter and arrange on the baking sheet.
Bake in preheated oven until the fish flakes easily with a fork, 15 to 20 minutes.

toasted-coconut-sundaes-with-candied-pea.name: Toasted Coconut Sundaes With Candied Peanuts

ingredients.item: Butter coconut cookies are available at many asian markets.

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast coconut on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden, about 5 minutes; let cool.

Meanwhile, bring granulated sugar and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Cook, swirling pan occasionally and brushing down sides as needed with a wet brush, until mixture turns a deep amber color, 10–12 minutes. Mix in peanuts; scrape onto a parchment-lined baking sheet. Let cool; chop.

Heat palm sugar and ½ cup cream in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Transfer to a medium bowl; chill until cold. Add remaining 1½ cups cream and beat to soft peaks. Divide ice cream among bowls and top with whipped cream, peanuts, and coconut. Serve with cookies.

tomatillo-and-chicken-soup.name: Tomatillo And Chicken Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a deep skillet over medium heat. Add onion and cook until it begins to turn translucent, about 4 minutes. Stir in tomatillos, garlic, and jalapeno pepper; cook about 1 minute.
Add chicken broth, green chiles, cilantro, cumin, coriander, salt, and pepper; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes. Add chicken and simmer for 5 more minutes.
Remove from the heat and stir in Monterey Jack cheese and crema.

tomato-meatballs-argiro.name: Tomato Meatballs

ingredients.item: 5 ripe and tight tomatoes (or santorin tomatoes)
1 cup capotyri spicy grated (or hard slice in rubles)
4-5 tablespoons of flour that inflates alone
5 ripe and tight tomatoes (or santorin tomatoes)
1 cup capotyri spicy grated (or hard slice in rubles)
4-5 tablespoons of flour that inflates alone

instructions: Wash the tomatoes, chop them with the knife and put them in a bowl.
Add the onions, dry and fresh, and mix them with a spoon to wither from the tomato.
Add the herbs, oregano, thyme, mint, and then cheese, egg, buffo and salt pepper.
Add the flour until we have a thin porridge.
Heat the olive oil and add the mixture.
Fry until golden, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Let the tomato meatballs on absorbent paper drain and serve.

tomato-pie.name: Tomato Pie

ingredients.prep: or more to taste, cut into wedges

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Press pie crust into a 9-inch round pan or glass pie plate; fold excess dough under and press to form a thick edge. Cover edges with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until light brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Sprinkle ½ cup mozzarella cheese over bottom. Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Drain tomato wedges in a colander or on paper towels; arrange over mozzarella cheese. Sprinkle with chopped basil and garlic.
Combine remaining 1 cup mozzarella cheese, mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, and white pepper in a bowl; spread over tomatoes but do not spread onto crust.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and bubbly, 35 to 40 minutes. Garnish with whole basil leaves and serve warm.

tomato-toast-with-blue-cheese-butter.name: Tomato Toast With Blue Cheese Butter

ingredients.item: A small pinch of kosher salt
A scattering of coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs

instructions: In a small bowl, use a fork to smash together 2 oz. mild blue cheese (room temperature) and 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter (room temperature).
Using a Microplane, finely grate in 1 garlic clove.
Add a small pinch of kosher salt and season with freshly ground pepper. Mix well to combine.
When ready to eat, spread the prepared blue cheese butter evenly over 4 thick slices of toasted bread.
Top each slice with 2 large heirloom tomatoes, sliced.
Season with sea salt and additional freshly ground pepper to taste.
Finish by scattering coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs over the top.

tomato-watermelon-gazpacho.name: Tomato-watermelon Gazpacho

ingredients.item: Pickled jalapeño slices plus 1 tbsp. juice

instructions: Add the watermelon to a blender, blend on high until smooth, and strain through a fine-mesh strainer into a bowl. Discard the solids and pour the watermelon juice back into the blender.

Add the tomatoes, celery, bell pepper, green onions, pickled jalapeño and juice, and salt. Blend on high speed until completely smooth, 3 to 5 minutes. With the blender running, slowly pour in the oil and blend for an additional 2 to 3 minutes, or until emulsified. Taste and season with salt and jalapeño juice as needed.

Transfer to an airtight container and chill at least 2 hours before serving.
Do ahead: Store leftovers refrigerated in an airtight container for up to 4 days or freeze for up to 2 months.

tomatoes-and-blue-cheese.name: Tomatoes And Blue Cheese
instructions: Arrange tomato wedges on a plate.
Top with blue cheese dressing, chives, and pepper.

torch-drops-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Torch Drops Recipe
instructions: Mix sugar, water and lemon juice into a bowl until you get a consistent preparation.
On a kitchen net, have the egg threads in separate portions in triangular shape.
Deite a calda sobre os fios de ovos e deixe secar. Sirva de seguida.

Place a net strainer over a bowl, lay the yolks on it and stir slightly with a fork until they open. Let them pass through the strainer to the bowl, and only the whitish "skin" that protects them should remain in the strainer.

Light a pot with the sugar and water, stir and let it boil for 1 minute. Lay the yolks inside a funnel suitable for egg threads and drop into the sugar syrup, making circular movements. Then remove the threads of eggs with a skimmer, put on a drainer and let it cool
Add more yolks using the same funnel, first adding a few drops of cold water to the syrup so that the sugar point does not get too thick.

tornado-twist.name: Tornado Twist

ingredients.item: Or bottle lemon-lime flavored carbonated beverage

instructions: In a pitcher, mix cranberry-raspberry juice with lemon-lime soda.
Pour over ice and serve.

tortellini-with-gorgonzola-lezzet.name: Tortellini With Gorgonzola
instructions: 1. Smoothed dough knead.
2. Stretch yellow to the movie and leave at 30 minutes to rest.
3. Walnuts, aroma in the pan &e; roast up to the pan.
4. Prepare a mild syrup to boil sugar and juice.
5. Soyed peudu this swelling's interior take the edge of the interior soak and cool until softened.
6. Heat in jealous fire in a sauce pot.
7. Add the cheese with Gorgonzola and mix it until soon.
8. Cool the mixture from the filler consistency into the light-and-light.
9. Briefly in the pan of pecan Olives;re roasting and flavoring &gray;free.
10. Open Dined pulp thinning.
11. 11. 11. 11. U small parchput Gorgonzola elephants in the form of the people.
12. Cover the other dough with solid and press the edges and form the tortellini.
12. August Prepared tortellini’s plenty of salty boiling water in consistency.
14 July  In a pan, melt the butter and add it to the lemon peel.
15. In addition to some cake juice, preparation emulsion.
16. Boiled tortellini’
17. September September 2019
18. Serve s&uuml with prepared pear slices and roasted pecan walnuts.

tourtiere-french-canadian-meat-pie.name: Tourtière (french Canadian Meat Pie)
instructions: Add flour, butter, and salt to the bowl of a food processor. Pulse until butter is pea-sized, about 30 seconds. Stir water and vinegar together in a small bowl; drizzle over flour mixture. Pulse until mixture is crumbly, but holds together when pinched, about 10 seconds. Drizzle in more cold water a little at a time if dough is too dry.
Transfer mixture to a work surface; form a ball, then flatten into a disc. Wrap in plastic; refrigerate for 1 hour.
Mix salt, black pepper, thyme, sage, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, mustard, clove, and cayenne together in a small bowl for the spice blend; set aside.

Add potato and 1 teaspoon salt to a medium saucepan; cover with cold water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to low; simmer until tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Transfer potato to a large bowl with a slotted spoon; mash until smooth (reserve cooking water); set aside.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and a pinch of salt. Cook until onions are golden, 10 to 15 minutes. Add celery, garlic, and spice blend to the skillet; stir until well combined, about 30 seconds.

Add pork, beef, and about 3/4 cup of reserved cooking water to the skillet for filling. Cook, stirring occasionally, until meat is brown, and most of the liquid has evaporated, about 45 minutes. Stir in potato, turn off the heat, and let cool.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Divide dough into 2 pieces, 1 slightly larger than the other. Roll larger piece into a 12-inch circle on a lightly floured work surface. Place in a 9-inch, deep-dish pie plate. Roll remaining dough into an 11-inch circle; set aside.

Fill bottom crust evenly with meat mixture; whisk egg and water together in a small bowl for egg wash. Brush egg wash over edges of crust. Cover with top crust; press lightly around edges to seal. Trim excess dough; crimp edges. Cut small slits in top crust for steam to escape. Brush surface of pie with egg wash.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is deep golden, about 1 hour. Let cool to almost room temperature before serving.

traditional-gardener-teleculinaria.name: Traditional Gardener

ingredients.item: 400 g  carne de vaca para guisar

instructions: Descasque e pique a cebola e aloure-a num tacho com o azeite. Adicione o tomate e deixe refogar.
Corte a carne em cubos pequenos, adicione ao refogado, envolva e deixe cozinhar.
Peel and cut the carrots and potatoes into cubes. Add to the pot, as well as the green beans, previously arranged and cut into pieces.
Finally, add the peas and mint branch. Cover with water, lower the heat and let cook for about 20 minutes. In the end, correct the seasonings of salt and pepper and serve.

traditional-tlacoyos-comedera.name: Traditional Tlacoyos

ingredients.item: 6 cups of nixtamalised maize flour (white or blue)
300 g Roast meat minced into small pieces
300 gr queso fresco desmoronado o rallado
Salsa verde o salsa roja al gusto

instructions: Para comenzar, vamos a moler o triturar nuestros frijoles refritos para obtener una pasta. Luego, los reservaremos.
In the case of cilantro, you have to make sure that it's clear and disinfected. I recommend moist with a vinegar jet. If we haven't minced this ingredient yet, this is a good time to leave it ready.
Also you can mince the roasted meat if you haven't already and as well crumbling or grilling the cheese if you haven't.
En el caso de la media cebolla, hay que pelarla y picarla en cubitos.

The key to our tlacoyas being good is at mass work. So we'll put special attention to this part. To prepare the mass, we will get a good size container, where we can place the flour (6 cups), a little water and 6 cups.

Mezclaremos bien el agua y la harina hasta obtener una masa suave. Una vez que la masa tenga buena textura y cero grumos, la mantendremos tapada con una tela hasta el momento de usarla, para que no se deshidrate.
Luego, pondremos a calentar un comal o plancha.

We'll get back to the dough while the conal gets hot to make balls as little balls of ball. The best thing to do is put each ball of dough into two plastic sheets and then put them up with the help of a kitchen roller.

When we have put up the dough till we get a kind of wheel, we will place at the centre one or two tablespoons of frying bean dough (depending on how big we are giving to the tlacoyo). Then we'll double the dough as if we're making a cheesadilla. Once we have obtained this form, we will put pressure on the edges to unify the mass and close the tlacoyo.
Then we will put up a little more shape, lengthening to the ends, to extend the points characteristic of these cravings.

To continue, we will grease the hot plate or comal and then place the tlacoyos to cook (on average, they take two minutes on each side). We can use the comal to also keep hot the pits of roasted meat.
Para servir, cubrir cada tlacoyo con un poco de salsa, un toque de crema y un poco de carne asada. Espolvorear con cebolla, queso y cilantro picado.

tricolor-ice-cream-cake-lezzet.name: Tricolor Ice Cream Cake
instructions: 1. Strawberry and powder sugar from hand blender and make it pure.
2. Cover for round glass bowl with stretch film.
3. roughly transfer the bitter chocolate you've softened.
4. Place a smaller container in the middle and open the middle part in the pool form and wait for 10 minutes in the freezer.
5. Pour the fruity ice cream on the chocolate and open the middle in the pool with a smaller container.
6.  10 dakika derin dondurucuda beklettin.
7. Pour the berries on porridge.
8. Grab with stretch film and hold at least 4 hours in deep freezer and serve.
9. You can access the ice creamy cake recipe that you can present in the celebrations alternately.

triple-layer-strawberry-cake.name: Triple-layer Strawberry Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray three 9-inch cake pans with nonstick cooking spray.

Mix cake mix, gelatin, eggs, oil, sugar, strawberries, milk, and flour for cake together in a large bowl with an electric mixer on low speed until just combined. Scrape the sides of the bowl, and increase mixer speed to medium; beat for 3 minutes. Pour cake batter evenly into the prepared pans.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the centers comes out clean, about 23 minutes. Cool cakes in pans on a rack for about 10 minutes. Remove from pans and cool completely in the refrigerator.

Meanwhile, make frosting. Beat butter in a large bowl at medium speed until it's pale yellow and fluffy. Add confectioners' sugar and strawberries and beat at low speed until well combined and creamy. Set in the refrigerator for 5 to 10 minutes to firm it up slightly (you just don't want it to be runny).

Spread one of the layers of cake with frosting then refrigerate. Frost the second layer and refrigerate until the frosting on both layers has firmed up a bit. Assemble all the layers and frost the top and sides. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

tuna-noodle-casserole-with-leeks-and-fre.name: Tuna Noodle Casserole With Leeks And Fresh Dill

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only; from about 2 large

ingredients.item: -ounce cans albacore tuna (preferably packed in olive oil)

instructions: Butter 8x8x2" glass baking dish. Melt unsalted butter in heavy large saucepan over medium heat. Add leeks and celery seeds to saucepan; sprinkle lightly with coarse kosher salt. Cover saucepan and cook until leeks are tender but not brown, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Add flour; stir 1 minute. Gradually add milk and half and half; simmer until mixture thickens slightly, stirring often, about 5 minutes. Stir in lemon juice. Season leek sauce to taste with coarse kosher salt and pepper. Remove sauce from heat.

Meanwhile, cook egg noodles in large pot of boiling salted water until tender, stirring occasionally. Drain noodles, reserving ¾ cup noodle cooking liquid. Transfer noodles to large bowl. Pour leek sauce over noodles. Add grated Gruyère cheese and dill and stir to blend; add reserved noodle cooking liquid by tablespoons until mixture is moist and creamy (about 8 tablespoons). Fold in tuna. Transfer to prepared baking dish.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Bake noodle casserole, covered with foil, until heated through, about 20 minutes if freshly made or 30 minutes if chilled. Remove foil. Sprinkle crushed potato chips over and continue to bake, uncovered, until top is golden brown and filling bubbles, about 10 minutes longer. Serve hot.

tuna-omelet-recipe-comedera.name: Tuna Omelet Recipe
instructions: Cut the onion into small pieces.
Corta en cubitos el tomate. Si deseas, puedes quitarle las semillas.
Reold the mushrooms.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and scrape the onion and then tomato and cook for two minutes.
Then add the mushrooms and sew with salt and pepper. Meg and cook for a minute.
Mientras, bate muy bien los huevos en un plato profundo hasta que queden bien espumosos.
Open the tin tuna and pour into the frying pan. mix and finish cooking for 2 minutes.
Vierte los huevos y cocina hasta que cuajen, luego dobla la tortilla y termina de cocinar.
Serves and goes with bread or salad toast.

tuna-pasta-with-capers-lezzet.name: Tuna Pasta With Capers

ingredients.item: ½ tablespoon of chopped fresh yeast

instructions: 1. Surely chop onions fine.
2. Add the olive oil onions in the middle fire in a pan and soak about 10 minutes until it starts caramelization.
3. Add tuna, capari and red pepper.
4.  Sotelemeye devam edin.
5. In a other pot, add cake to the interior of boiling water, and cook the cooking suede on the back of the package 2-3 minutes less than a time.
6. Take the juice of the tomato cake in a bowl and strain.
7. Add and mix baked pasta to the mixture of tons fish pan.
8. Add some portion of the pasta juice and cook 1-2 minutes until the pasta softens.
9. U you can sprinkle the fragile parsley on the car.

tuna-snails-and-olives-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Snails And Olives
instructions: Escorra o atum muito bem e coloque-o numa tigela. Descasque e pique a cebola, pique as azeitonas e a salsa e adicione ao atum. Tempere com sal e pimenta e envolva tudo muito bem.
Extend the leafy dough on a surface sprinkled with flour and brush with the beaten egg. Have the tuna prepared over the dough and wrap carefully.

Cut the roll into slices about 1 cm thick and place them on a board, lined with vegetable paper. Brush them again with beaten egg and put them in the oven, preheated to 190oC, for 15 minutes, or until they are golden. Remove, let it cool and serve.

tuna-tataki-japanese-recipe-comedera.name: Tuna Tataki, Japanese Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of ajonjoli or sesame oil

instructions: To begin with, we will awaken with a small saucepan the vinegar of rice or myrin, sake, soy sauce and sugar. We'll remove the ingredients so they'll mix well.

If they haven't got their ginger broken up yet, note that we have to skin them first. Once we have passed through the paddle, we will have a tablespoon (or even a little less) and we will add it to the liquid that we have already drawn from the fire. We will also mix oil and mustard if we have decided to use that last. We'll have a good reveling of this sauce.

The dataki marinade is performed by allowing the tuna loin to stand inside this liquid for an hour (some leave it up to 8 hours to have a better taste). We will do this in a container put up in the refrigerator, covered so that our preparation does not reset. If the fish isn't fully covered with the liquid, we have to turn them about half the rest time.

Once we have been seawold, we will get the tuna out and seal it quickly, onto an iron or frying pan. It's best to grease the surface with a little more oil to prevent tuna from gluing. The plate should be hot and hot as soon as we place the tuna and we will simply seal or light it. That means we'll only let him cook a few seconds, both sides, to get our piece baked out and raw inside.

When we remove the tuna from his cooking, we'll put it through a plate with sesame grains to bounce. It may be a good idea to remove the fish back into the remains of a marinade so that the seeds will stick more easily. Some people prefer to bounce them before sealing them, but I leave them for later, to avoid the risk that some sesame grains will be burned and become bitter, and that they will not restrict contact between fish meat and heat.
Once we have bounced the tuna, we will be leaking it into fine sheets with the help of a big and very sharp knife. We'll try and get a 4 to 5 mm thick plate.
To serve, tuna Tataki is accompanied by what remains of the marinade and fish juices on the plate (if applicable). That plate is consumed cold or at room temperature.

turkey-breast-with-roasted-broccolini.name: Turkey Breast With Roasted Broccolini

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°.

Remove turkey breast from refrigerator at least 15 minutes before cooking. Loosen the skin and rub 1 Tbsp. oil on top and bottom of the turkey breast, as well as under the skin. Season turkey all over with five-spice powder, salt, and pepper.

Place turkey breast on a rimmed baking sheet and tuck garlic cloves beneath it. Cook on lower oven rack until thickest part of turkey breast registers 165° on an instant-read thermometer, 60–75 minutes. Remove from oven and let rest at least 10 minutes before carving.

Meanwhile, toss broccolini with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil and season with salt. Lay in a single layer on a baking sheet and place on the upper oven rack. Cook until broccolini is crisp on the edges, 17–23 minutes.
Remove garlic from under turkey breast; roughly chop and toss with broccolini. Serve broccolini with slices of turkey. Reserve 4 oz. of meat for tomorrow’s lunch.

turkey-brine.name: Turkey Brine
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a large stockpot.
Stir in salt and brown sugar until dissolved; return to a boil.
Add bay leaves, peppercorns, rosemary, thyme, and cloves. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes.
Remove from the heat and let cool completely before using.
Place thawed turkey into a large non-reactive container. Pour in cooled brine.
Pour in enough cool water to cover turkey with liquid. Refrigerate 8 to 12 hours.
Remove turkey from brine and let sit on counter for about 2 hours.
Follow your favorite recipe to cook your turkey.

turkey-burgers.name: Turkey Burgers
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the turkey, panko, mayonnaise, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper, and mix with your hands until just evenly incorporated.
Divide the turkey mixture into 4 equal portions and shape into 4 patties.

Heat the canola oil in a large nonstick pan over medium-high heat. Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the patties and cook, without moving, until browned, 3–4 minutes. Carefully flip the patties and continue cooking until the burgers are cooked through and golden brown, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C (75°C), 3–4 minutes more.
Serve the burgers on buns with ketchup, tomato, red onion, lettuce, and pickles, if desired.
Enjoy!

turkey-club-with-herb-mayo.name: Turkey Club With Herb Mayo

ingredients.item: White pullman or pain de mie
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Coarsely grind peppercorns, coriander, and juniper in spice mill or with mortar and pestle. Mix in a small bowl with salt and sugar and rub all over turkey. Wrap turkey in plastic and chill at least 12 hours and up to 1 day.
Let turkey sit at room temperature 30 minutes before roasting.

Preheat oven to 250°. Pat turkey dry with paper towels. Heat oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Cook turkey until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes total. Transfer skillet to oven and roast turkey, turning once, until an instant-read thermometer inserted in the center registers 155°, 55–80 minutes. Transfer turkey to a cutting board and let rest at least 30 minutes (internal temperature will climb to 165°); reserve any juices in skillet. Thinly slice turkey and drizzle pan juices over before serving.
Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, turning as needed, until browned and crisp, 12–15 minutes. Transfer to paper towels to drain.
Blend jalapeños, garlic, cilantro, parsley, mayonnaise, lemon zest, and lemon juice in a blender until smooth; season herb mayonnaise with salt and pepper.

Spread herb mayonnaise on 1 side of each slice of bread. Top 4 slices with turkey, tomato, bacon, and lettuce. Top each with another slice of bread, mayo side up, and repeat layers (you’ll have some turkey left over); close sandwiches.
Do Ahead: Herb mayonnaise can be made and bacon can be cooked 1 day ahead. Cover and chill separately.

turkey-cordon-bleu-recipe-step-by-step-c.name: Turkey Cordon Bleu Recipe Step By Step.
turkey-cordon-bleu-recipe-step-by-step-c.original_name: Receta de Cordon Bleu de pavo paso a paso.
instructions: Inicia la receta y toma las pechugas de pavo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto por ambos lados.
Beat your balls and leave them in a bowl. In another bowl, mix frosted bread, powder garlic and paprika.
Warm a frying pan with abundant oil.
Coloca la harina de trigo en otro bol o plato hondo.
Take the seasoned turkey breasts and you will put in half two pieces of yellow cheese and two pieces of turkey ham or baked.
Enrolla muy bien y dobla las puntas hacia adentro. Sujeta con palillos para que el relleno no se salga.
He put his breasts through wheat flour and then through his egg and finally into his frosted bread.
Fry till well cooked, juicy inside and golden outside. I recommend frying at medium heat.
Remove the blue cordage from the frying pan and place onto an absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serve with your favorite and ready partners.

turkey-stuffed-with-pistachios-recipe-co.name: Turkey Stuffed With Pistachios Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-pistachios-recipe-co.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con pistachos
instructions: Sazona las pechugas de pavo con sal y pimienta por ambos lados. Reserva.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Trocea los dientes de ajo
Warm up a frying pan and melt the butter. Soak the onion and garlic teeth for about 3 minutes till they are golden. Turn it off.
Trocea los pistachos.
In a bowl, incorporates cream cheese, pistachos, crushed tomato, cranberries, salt, pepper and provençal herbs. It's a good mix till you get a dough.
Filling his breasts with his mixture and his face with his arm and his arm and his arm. Put his breasts on a plate and scuba with some butter and parsley.
Hornea from 25 to 30 minutes or till juicy and tender meat. Once ready, remove from the oven and serve with your favorite accompaniments.

turkey-with-cornbread-stuffing.name: Turkey With Cornbread Stuffing
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Grease a pie pan.

In a bowl, mix cornmeal and water and allow to stand for 10 minutes. Meanwhile, whisk the whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a large bowl. Whisk the egg and vegetable oil into the wet cornmeal; stir the wet ingredients into the flour mixture until just combined and pour into the prepared pie pan.
Bake the cornbread in the preheated oven until lightly browned and a knife inserted into the center of the cornbread comes out clean, 20 to 30 minutes. Remove from oven and set aside to cool.
Reduce oven heat to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Cook the bacon in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned and crisp, about 6 minutes per side; drain on a paper towel-lined plate. Crumble the bacon when cool. Stir the onion, garlic, celery, red bell pepper, poultry seasoning, sage, and oregano into the bacon drippings left in the skillet; cook and stir until the onion is translucent, about 10 minutes.

Remove cooled cornbread from the pie pan and cut into small cubes; place into a large bowl and mix in the rye bread cubes. Stir the bacon and cooked vegetables into the stuffing until well combined; drizzle the chicken broth into the dressing, stirring to evenly moisten the bread cubes.

Rinse the turkey inside and out and pat dry with paper towels. Place turkey into a large roasting pan with a lid. Fill the body and neck cavities loosely with stuffing, folding the neck skin over the stuffing and securing in place with toothpicks. Place any leftover stuffing onto a large square of aluminum foil and fold and seal the edges to enclose the stuffing. Refrigerate stuffing packet until about 45 minutes before serving time.

Place the turkey in the oven, and roast until a meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh reads 82°C (80 degrees C), 3 1/2 to 4 hours. Remove lid after about 2 1/2 hours to brown skin. Baste occasionally with pan drippings. About 45 minutes before serving, bake the extra stuffing if desired.

twelve-days-cake-lezzet.name: Twelve Days Cake
instructions: 1. Adjust and heat the oven to 180 degrees.
2. melt the Margarine and rub the foam with powder.
3. Pour the eggs into the mixture by adding one by one.
4. Add flour, coconut and tar.
5. Add and mix grapes, grapes and almonds.
6.   Oil the middle hole cake mold and empty the dough.
7. Cook and cool for 25 minutes in the hot oven.
8. Serve the Keki mold and slice.
